# Ent Draught

> [!note] 📖 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Lore

![[143009.png]]

*Item. Ent.*

---

Play only if you control at least 1 **_Ent_** character.
Attach to a character. Limit 1 per character.
Attached character gets +2 hit points.
